title: Timiyou Pre-lit Christmas Decoration Garland, Christmas Artificial Green Pine Garlands, Christmas Rattan with Warm LED Lights, Silver Flower and Silver Ball, 9ft
features: 🎄【9 Feet Christmas Wreath】9 feet (105 inches), 10 inches in diameter, with pine needles, berries, balls and flowers, the wreath is lush like a real pine branch, perfect for decorating your home, it's Christmas of exquisite decorations.

🎄【SOFT AND DURABLE MATERIAL】- Our artificial flower garland is made from durable plastic with a realistic look that is also flame resistant and long-lasting. This decor, along with the memories made, will last for a long time of holidays and decorating.

🎄【OUTDOOR & INDOOR DECOR】Garland Decoration with bright colors is full of warmth and vitality, and the natural and beautiful shapes create a cheerful festive atmosphere. To create a Christmas atmosphere, you can use it to decorate your room, house, patio, and garden, can be hung on doors, windows, stairs, and mantels as beautiful decorations.

🎄【GARLAND WITH LIGHTS】- This prelit garland is operated by 3 AA batteries (not included). Pre-strung with 30 warm lights, you can place the battery-powered garland anywhere in your home without the worry of needing a socket nearby.

🎄【PERFECT FOR CHRISTMAS】- Christmas garland is specially designed to decorate Christmas, it is a very good choice to decorate the house, courtyard, and garden, I wish you and your family a happy Christmas holiday! Merry Christmas.
